claim_boundary: This validates that the NVMe crypto-erase sanitize command path completed on the evaluated device. It is destructive device/namespace-scoped evidence, not a per-zone or per-epoch physical erase primitive for a shared namespace. QUASAR's default claim remains reset eligibility and stale-secret exposure reduction; stronger physical erase requires a dedicated namespace/media pool, per-cohort key isolation, or hardware erase semantics whose blast radius matches the cohort.
